positive: A stylized, symmetrical illustration featuring a majestic golden retriever silhouette sitting gracefully among sprawling wildflowers and whimsical forest elements. The composition should be highly detailed, with intricate linework and clean, bold shapes. Use a limited, sophisticated color palette of deep indigo, burnt orange, and sage green, with the subject and flora appearing almost neon-glow against a muted background. Style: Scandinavian folk art meets modern enamel design. The scene should be highly stylized, vector-like, perfect for screen printing on a t-shirt. Strong central focus, high contrast, excellent detail, minimalist yet complex.
